messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.demand-discontinuity.prelet-lockout-year1-contestability","queries":[{"query":"FLAP-D data center pipeline 83% pre-let vacancy 6.3% 2026","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"colocation fit-out 2026 2027 rack PDU multi-vendor bake-off no incumbent framework","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center electrical switchgear PDU procurement lead time framework agreement 12-24 months","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.demand-discontinuity.frankfurt-grid-queue-de-slip","queries":[{"query":"Frankfurt data center grid connection queue 24-36 months 2025 2026","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"TenneT Amprion Frankfurt 542 MW data center under construction energization 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"JLL Frankfurt data center vacancy rate 2.2% 2025 report","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.demand-discontinuity.nl-grid-freeze-share-erosion","queries":[{"query":"Netherlands hyperscale data center construction ban Amsterdam zoning 350 MVA 2030","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Liander Stedin new data center grid capacity allocation announcement 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Dutch Data Center Association DDA colocation capacity report 2025 Amsterdam 70%","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.demand-discontinuity.ce-hyperscale-flow-mirage","queries":[{"query":"Synergy Research hyperscale self-build capacity share Ireland Netherlands Sweden Belgium 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"CBRE DC Byte Central Europe CE-7 hyperscale operated capacity share 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"2026 hyperscaler self-build data center campuses Europe 4.2 GW announced","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.demand-discontinuity.construction-plateau-lumpy-year1","queries":[{"query":"EMEA data center construction plateau 2.5 GW pipeline 15 GW 2026 Cushman Wakefield","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"JLL Cushman Wakefield H1 2026 EMEA data center construction starts report","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"public cloud providers 61% EMEA data center take-up 2025 hyperscaler capex","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
